roa.docketEntryComment: DIST ATTNY MOT TO CONSOLIDATE FILED TODAY IN ROOM 101 AT INSISTENCE

/CAL:DISPOSITION/X: AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE PEOPLE MOVE TO DISMISS THIS CASE PURSUANT TO PC 1385,/MO GRTD/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS AHARVEY WAIVER, /X:ANY RESTITUTION OR OTHER MATTERS RESULTING FROM DISMISSED CHARGES MAY BEADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN COURT NO,20004164,/

/CAL: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE/X:THE PEOPLE FILE A 1ST AMENDED CONSOLIDATED COMPLAINT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:08-05-20 (10TH DAY), 09-03-20(30TH DAY), 09-21-20 (60TH)/30    CACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERREDTO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DOP/
/CAL: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/VD: PTC ON 07-22-20 IN D17/BAIL: 3,000//X: BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/X: COURT CONFIRMS FUTURE HEARING DATE IND12 ON 07-22-20/DOP/

/CAL:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANTIS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PTC/DOP/

/CAL:TO JOIN & TRAIL 20004282 & DA MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE/FAVRPT/12    XPROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND  STAYED TO 05-26-20/X: BAIL SET AT $1,000/CONTD:BENCH WARRANT STAY STATUS/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/GTWM/987,2/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA2:647 MORSE ST, SF/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD:DEPT 12 TO JOIN AND TRAIL FELONY 20004282/DOP/
/CAL TO SET OR DISPO/FTA/BF/BWI/SURETY/BFORF TO SET PRELIM/BFORF2 3000/BAIL:10000/BWNUM:1ST/X: 3 OF 3 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/NIGHTSERV/
/CAL: TO TRAIL 20004164/CONTD: TO SET OR DISPO/DOP/
